name: establish_patrol_position
description: Establish a defensive position for patrol coverage to extend the defensive perimeter
parameters: z.object({ x: z.number().describe("The X coordinate to establish the defensive position at."), z: z.number().describe("The Z coordinate to establish the defensive position at."), radius: z.number().default(5).describe("The distance from the center that the bot should cover during patrol.") })

name: defensive_positioning
description: Move to a safe position and prepare for incoming hostile threats by kneeling and positioning defensively
parameters: z.object({ x: z.number().describe("Target X coordinate"), z: z.number().describe("Target Z coordinate"), y: z.number().optional().describe("Target Y coordinate, defaults to current height"), radius: z.number().default(2).describe("Distance tolerance for reaching the position") })
code: const targetX = args.x; const targetZ = args.z; const targetY = args.y ?? bot.entity.position.y; const radius = args.radius; const targetPos = new Vec3(targetX, targetY, targetZ); const equipDefensiveItems = async function() { const sword = bot.inventory.items().find(function(i) { return i.name.includes('sword'); }); if (sword) await bot.equip(sword, 'hand').catch(function() {}); const shield = bot.inventory.items().find(function(i) { return i.name.includes('shield'); }); if (shield) await bot.equip(shield, 'off-hand').catch(function() {}); }; await equipDefensiveItems(); startBackgroundSkill(bot, 'defensive_positioning', async function (token) { const movements = new Movements(bot); bot.pathfinder.setMovements(movements); try { await bot.pathfinder.goto(new goals.GoalNear(targetPos.x, targetPos.y, targetPos.z, radius)); } catch (e) {} while (!token.cancelled && bot.health > 0 && Boolean(bot.entity)) { if (!bot.physicsEnabled) { await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 100); }); continue; } bot.setControlState('sneak', true); const entities = Object.values(bot.entities); const enemies = entities.filter(function(e) { return e.id !== bot.entity.id && (e.type === 'mob' || e.type === 'player') && e.position.distanceTo(bot.entity.position) < 16; }).sort(function(a, b) { return a.position.distanceTo(bot.entity.position) - b.position.distanceTo(bot.entity.position); }); if (enemies.length > 0) { await bot.lookAt(enemies[0].position.offset(0, enemies[0].height || 1.6, 0), true); } await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 250); }); } bot.setControlState('sneak', false); }); return '<DEFENDING>: Moving to (' + targetX + ', ' + targetY + ', ' + targetZ + ') and assuming defensive stance.';

name: establish_defensive_position
description: Move to a safe defensive position with good visibility and ready to engage threats
